target.title: test(utils): add unit tests for E.164 phone number normalization
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The `normalizeE164` function in `src/utils.ts` normalizes phone-like input into the loose E.164 shape used by channel helpers. However, this function lacked unit tests to verify the normalization logic, which could lead to regressions when the function is modified.

## Why This Change Was Made

Add unit tests for `normalizeE164` function to verify E.164 phone number normalization behavior. This improves test coverage and prevents regressions.

Focused tests cover adding + prefix, preserving existing + prefix, removing non-digit characters, removing protocol prefix, handling empty strings, and handling whitespace.

## User Impact

E.164 phone number normalization now has comprehensive test coverage, reducing the risk of regressions when the function is modified.

## Evidence

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds direct coverage for existing helper behavior rather than reporting a user-visible runtime bug. Source inspection confirms the helper behavior the tests target.

Direct behavior probe:

```text
$ node --import tsx -e "import('./src/utils.js').then(({ normalizeE164 }) => console.log(JSON.stringify([{ desc: 'adds + prefix to digits', input: '1234567890', result: normalizeE164('1234567890'), expected: '+1234567890' }, { desc: 'preserves existing + prefix', input: '+1234567890', result: normalizeE164('+1234567890'), expected: '+1234567890' }, { desc: 'removes non-digit characters', input: '+1 (234) 567-890', result: normalizeE164('+1 (234) 567-890'), expected: '+1234567890' }, { desc: 'removes protocol prefix', input: 'tel:+1234567890', result: normalizeE164('tel:+1234567890'), expected: '+1234567890' }], null, 2)))"
[
  {
    "desc": "adds + prefix to digits",
    "input": "1234567890",
    "result": "+1234567890",
    "expected": "+1234567890"
  },
  {
    "desc": "preserves existing + prefix",
    "input": "+1234567890",
    "result": "+1234567890",
    "expected": "+1234567890"
  },
  {
    "desc": "removes non-digit characters",
    "input": "+1 (234) 567-890",
    "result": "+1234567890",
    "expected": "+1234567890"
  },
  {
    "desc": "removes protocol prefix",
    "input": "tel:+1234567890",
    "result": "+1234567890",
    "expected": "+1234567890"
  }
]
```

Targeted test:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/utils.normalize-e164.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 /home/0668001110/ZTEProject/openclaw-worktrees/pr-94335

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  10 passed (10)
   Start at  18:54:10
   Duration  987ms (transform 456ms, setup 456ms, import 71ms, tests 162ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 10.69s
```

Formatting:

```text
$ npx oxfmt --check src/utils.ts src/utils.normalize-e164.test.ts
Checking formatting...

All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 68ms on 2 files using 8 threads.
```

Whitespace:

```text
$ git diff --check
```

## AI-assisted

Prepared with Codex. I reviewed the change, understand the touched code path, and kept the PR focused on the bug described above.
target.author: dwc1997
